title: allium rotundum subsp. acutiflorum
intro: Allium rotundum subsp. acutiflorum, also known as sharp-leaved garlic or broad-leaved garlic, is a subspecies of the Allium rotundum plant, belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Allium rotundum subsp. acutiflorum include reducing high blood pressure, fighting off respiratory infections, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant often take the form of essential oils, extracts, or infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
